channel.title: RAG on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in RAG on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: APIM Support for Foundry Models in Azure AI Search
item.description:
Azure API Management now supports all Foundry model integrations in Azure AI Search in public preview. This lets teams put APIM in front of Foundry and Azure OpenAI models used in large-scale RAG pipelines.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure SQL as a knowledge source in Foundry IQ
item.description:
Azure SQL Database is now available in public preview as a first-class Knowledge Source in Azure AI Search / Foundry IQ. This lets developers and architects use authoritative SQL tables as a source for Copilot, RAG, and agentic experiences.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Agentic Retrieval Toolkit for Azure Cosmos DB
item.description:
Azure Cosmos DB now has a public preview of the Agentic Retrieval Toolkit. It is aimed at building advanced RAG applications for GraphRAG-style and multi-hop reasoning use cases.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Knowledge as a Service with Azure Logic Apps.
item.description:
Azure Logic Apps is introducing a public preview aimed at simplifying RAG by providing “Knowledge as a Service.” The update says teams can avoid building and operating the full ingestion, chunking, embeddings, vector store, and retrieval stack themselves.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: dotnet: Generative AI for Beginners .NET: Version 2 on .NET 10
item.description:
Microsoft announced Version 2 of Generative AI for Beginners .NET, a free course rebuilt for .NET 10. It adds Microsoft.Extensions.AI, updated RAG patterns, and new agent framework content across five lessons focused on production-ready AI apps.

  • Source: .NET
